Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-15_01-25-07_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.ts

Add reproduction logic: dead cells with exactly 3 live neighbors are born. The simplest approach: for each live cell, look at its 8 neighbors. Any dead neighbor that has exactly 3 live neighbors becomes a candidate birth.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text:
All tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added reproduction logic. For each live cell, iterate over its 8 neighbors. Any dead neighbor with exactly 3 live neighbors is born (deduplicated via a `seen` set).
**Result**: All tests now pass (5 passing, 2 todo)
**Approach**: Reuses the existing `countNeighbors` helper. The simplest correct way to enumerate birth candidates is to look at dead neighbors of live cells — any dead cell with 3 live neighbors must be adjacent to at least one live cell, so this covers all births. Deduplication uses a Set keyed by coordinates.
